title: Proclamation No. 1616, s. 2008
text:
PROCLAMATION NO. 1616

CREATING AND DESIGNATING THE BUKIDNON AGRO-RESOURCES EXPORT ZONE, SITUATED IN A PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PRIVATE DOMAIN LOCATED AT BARANGAY AGUSAN CANYON, MUNICIPALITY OF MANOLO FORTICH, PROVINCE OF BUKIDNON, ISLAND OF MINDANAO, AS AGRO-INDUSTRIAL ECONOMIC ZONE, PURSUANT TO REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7916 AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8748

Pursuant to the powers vested in me under Republic Act No. 7916, otherwise known as the Special Economic Zone Act of 1995, as amended by Republic Act No. 8748, and upon recommendation of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, I, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO, President of the Philippines, by virtue of the powers vested in me by law, do hereby create and designate the Bukidnon Agro-Resources Export Zone as Agro-Industrial Economic Zone, subject to the provisions of Republic Act No. 7916 as amended, its Implementing Rules and Regulations, Resolution No. 07-232 dated 16 May 2007, and Resolution No. 07-278 dated 02 July 2007 of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, an area located at Barangay Agusan Canyon, Manolo Fortich, Bukidnon, Island of Mindanao containing an aggregate area of Four Hundred Sixty One Thousand Seven Hundred (461,700) Square Meters, more or less, as defined by the following technical description:

A Consolidation of

Lot 4-9, Portion, Lot 4-24, Portion,

Lot 4-10 and Lot 4-11

Csd-10-005251-D

A parcel of Land (as shown on plan Csd-10-005251-D, being a consolidation of Portions of Lot 4-9, Portion of Lot 4-24, Portion of Lot 4-10 and Lot 4-11, all of Csd-10-005251-D, situated in Barangay Agusan Canyon, Manolo Fortich, Province of Bukidnon, Island of Mindanao.

Bounded on the N., along lines 29-31 by the remaining portion of Lot 4-24, Csd-10-005251-D; on the E., along lines 31-34-1 by the remaining portion of Lot 4-24, Csd-10-005251-D; SE along lines 1-2 by the remaining portion of Lot 4-24, Csd-10-005251-D; SW., along lines 2-6 by the remaining portion of Lot 4-9, Csd-10-005251-D; along lines 6-25 by Induyog Creek; NW., along line 25-29 by Lot 4-11, Csd-10-005251-D (DEARBC)

Beginning at a point marked вЂњ1вЂќ on plan, being S. 07 deg. 11вЂ™E.; 9,040.67 meters from BLLM No. 1, Pls-854, Alae, Manolo Fortich, Bukidnon;

beginning; containing anВ  area of FOUR HUNDRED SIXTY ONE THOUSAND SEVEN HUNDRED (461,700) SQUARE METERS, more or less. All points referred to are indicated on plan and are marked on the ground, bearings true; date of original survey, August 1968, that of the consolidation survey June 30, 2007.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done, in the City of Manila, this 8 th day of SEP in the year of our Lord, Two Thousand and Eight.

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

By the President:

Executive Secretary
